signals.text: This is completely unacceptable. I've been waiting 6 weeks for my claim to be processed and nobody can tell me what's happening. I want this treated as a formal complaint.
I need to speak to a manager immediately. Your advisor gave me incorrect information about my policy excess and now I'm £500 out of pocket. This needs to be escalated.
I've called four times now about the same issue. Each time I'm told it will be resolved within 48 hours. It's been three weeks. I expect a full investigation into why this keeps happening.
I want a full refund. The product you sold me was described as having features it clearly doesn't have. I feel completely misled and I want my money back.
I'm really struggling to understand my latest statement. The charges don't seem to match what I was told when I signed up. I'm on a fixed income and this is causing me a lot of worry.
I've been a loyal customer for 15 years and I've just seen that new customers are getting a much better rate than me. It doesn't feel right that my loyalty counts for nothing.
Honestly, I'm at my wit's end. My mother is 82 and can't use your app. She called your helpline and was told everything is online now. She doesn't have internet. What is she supposed to do?
I appreciate you looking into this, but I've now received three different answers from three different people about whether I'm covered. I just need clarity — it's been really stressful not knowing.
I tried to cancel my policy online but there's no option. I called and was on hold for 45 minutes before giving up. I tried the webchat and got disconnected. I just want to cancel.

Thank you for your help so far. I just wanted to follow up — it's been about a month since my claim and I haven't heard back. I'm sure it's in progress but just wanted to check as I'm getting a bit anxious about it.

Hi there, hope you're well. I noticed a small discrepancy on my account — I seem to have been charged twice for my March premium. Could you possibly look into it when you get a chance? No rush, but would be good to get it sorted.
Why is your website SO SLOW today?! I just need to download my tax certificate and it keeps timing out. Is there maintenance happening??
I can't believe the premiums for young drivers these days. Just got quoted £3,200 for my son's first car. Absolutely mad. Is there anything that can bring it down?
Hi, could you send me a copy of my policy documents? I seem to have misplaced mine. Thanks.
I'd like to add my partner to my home insurance policy. Can you tell me what information you'll need from them?
Just wanted to say thanks to Sarah in your claims team — she was really helpful and patient walking me through the process. Great service.
I'm a bit disappointed that the renewal price went up by 20% when I haven't made any claims. I'll probably shop around this year.
signals.note: Borderline — expressing dissatisfaction but not clearly expecting resolution. Could reasonably be classified either way.

signals.text: Your app crashed again when I tried to submit my claim photos. This is the third time. I've given up and will post them instead.
signals.note: The customer has found a workaround and isn't explicitly asking for resolution. But repeated failures + giving up could signal a complaint.

signals.text: I see you've changed the terms on the savings account. The new rate is quite a bit lower. I understand rates change but it would have been nice to have more notice.
signals.note: Feedback, not a complaint — acknowledges the change is within rights, just wishes for better communication. But some might classify as implicit complaint.

signals.text: Been trying to get through to someone about my travel insurance claim since I got back from holiday. Left three voicemails, sent two emails. Starting to wonder if anyone actually works there.
I'm going through chemotherapy at the moment and I really can't deal with this right now. The letter says I owe £240 but I've already paid. Please, I just need someone to sort this out for me.

My husband passed away last month and I need to update the joint account. I called last week and was told I need a death certificate — I've sent it twice now and nothing has changed. I don't know what else to do.

Where do I even start. First you lost my claim paperwork. Then the replacement documents had someone else's name on them. Then I was told my claim was denied based on information I never provided. I want answers and I want compensation for the stress this has caused me.

I was told my excess would be £100 but I've been charged £350. On top of that, the repair garage you recommended did a terrible job and I now need to get it redone elsewhere at my own cost. And nobody returns my calls.
Disgusting service.
Can I change my direct debit date?
Worst company ever. Moving to [competitor] first chance I get.
Thanks for sorting that out so quickly! Really appreciate it.
I'm not happy about the wait time but I understand you're busy. Just hoping it gets sorted soon.
signals.note: Expresses dissatisfaction but explicitly shows understanding. Most would not classify as complaint.

signals.text: Your terms and conditions are 47 pages long. I have a law degree and I struggled to understand them. How is a normal customer supposed to know what they're agreeing to?
